message:
Remove eager materialization path, keep cursor-only lazy parsing

Cursor/flyweight pattern beats eager in all cases:
- cursor(5 props): 1.36x vs JSON.parse (was 10x for eager)
- cursor(2 props): ~1.0x (tied with JSON.parse)
- cursor(1 prop): 0.82x (18% FASTER than JSON.parse)

Removed: keyIntern, shapeCtors, getShapeCtor, materializeFromBuffer,
readValue, readUtf16String, compareKeyBytes, readKeyAndRecord,
doc_materialize types, and all eager-mode branching in parse().
